_note: First-party Aleph MCP servers, hand-curated, trust_tier=official, via=aleph-official (same provenance badge as Aleph-skills / Aleph-plugins). Sourced from github.com/rootazero/Aleph-mcp — Aleph's official MCP repo that fills gaps where vendors ship no official MCP. Projected by scripts/pipeline/mcp-presets.ts (loadAlephMcp), bypassing source discovery. Each entry links to its real upstream subdir.

entries.name: SiliconFlow 媒体生成
entries.author: rootazero

env.name: SILICONFLOW_API_BASE
env.description: 可选：覆盖区域端点（默认 https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1；海外用 .com）

env.name: SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR
env.description: 可选：本地保存生成的图片/视频目录（否则仅返回临时 URL）

env.name: SILICONFLOW_AUDIO_DIR
env.description: 可选：音频保存目录（默认同 SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR）

entries.description_en: Aleph's official SiliconFlow media-generation MCP — image / video / TTS over a uvx stdio process.
entries.description_zh: Aleph 官方 SiliconFlow 媒体生成 MCP — 经 uvx stdio 暴露图像 / 视频 / 语音合成。
entries.long_en: First-party MCP built by Aleph (clean rewrite, verified against SiliconFlow's official docs). Exposes generate_image / edit_image / generate_video / generate_speech / list_models / get_user_info via a uvx-spawned Python process.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 自建的一方 MCP（全新实现，对照 SiliconFlow 官方文档核验）。经 uvx 拉起的 Python 子进程暴露 generate_image / edit_image / generate_video / generate_speech / list_models / get_user_info 等工具。
entries.sec_note_en: Needs a SILICONFLOW_API_KEY; runs a uvx-spawned Python process and calls SiliconFlow's paid media APIs. Generated media URLs expire quickly — set SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR to persist assets.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需 SILICONFLOW_API_KEY；经 uvx 拉起 Python 子进程，调用 SiliconFlow 付费媒体 API。生成的媒体 URL 很快过期 —— 设置 SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR 可本地留存。
